parameters.query:
WITH expected AS (
  SELECT * FROM (VALUES
    ('cron_health_check', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'health_check_ok'),
    ('cron_blocklist_cleanup', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'blocklist_cleanup'),
    ('cron_data_integrity', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'data_integrity_ok'),
    ('cron_security_events_auto_resolve', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'security_events_auto_resolve'),
    ('cron_access_log_purge', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'access_log_purge'),
    ('cron_db_size_check', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'db_size_snapshot_ok'),
    ('cron_backup_verify', INTERVAL '26 hours', 'backup_verify_ok'),
    ('cron_stuck_executions', INTERVAL '90 minutes', 'stuck_executions_marked'),
    ('cron_security_events_purge', INTERVAL '8 days', 'security_events_purge'),
    ('cron_vacuum_analyze', INTERVAL '8 days', 'vacuum_analyze')
  ) AS t(workflow_name, max_silence, action_name)
),
last_runs AS (
  SELECT e.workflow_name, e.max_silence, e.action_name,
         (SELECT max(created_at) FROM activity_log WHERE action = e.action_name) AS last_run_at
    FROM expected e
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'audited_count', count(*),
  'stale_count', count(*) FILTER (WHERE last_run_at IS NULL OR last_run_at < now() - max_silence),
  'stale_workflows', (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT workflow_name, last_run_at, max_silence::text FROM last_runs WHERE last_run_at IS NULL OR last_run_at < now() - max_silence) t),
  'all_runs', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.workflow_name) FROM (SELECT workflow_name, last_run_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - last_run_at))/3600 AS hours_ago FROM last_runs) t)
) AS report FROM last_runs;

SELECT raise_security_event(
  'unusual_access_pattern'::text,
  'high'::text,
  'cron'::text, '/cron_workflow_audit'::text, 'workflow_audit'::text, NULL::uuid,
  $1::int || ' workflows criticos sin actividad reciente. Probablemente desactivados o fallando silenciosamente.',
  $2::jsonb
) AS event_id;
INSERT INTO activity_log (action, agent_name, details) VALUES ('workflow_audit_ok', 'cron_workflow_audit', $1::jsonb);
